title: Disposable 3 Compartment Bagasse Plates (10 inch, 50 Pack) – Heavy Duty Biodegradable Paper Plates | Compostable Eco-Friendly Divided Natural Sugarcane Fibres – Microwave & Freezer Safe for Parties
features: 𝐏𝐑𝐀𝐂𝐓𝐈𝐂𝐀𝐋 𝟑-𝐂𝐎𝐌𝐏𝐀𝐑𝐓𝐌𝐄𝐍𝐓 𝐃𝐄𝐒𝐈𝐆𝐍: These 10-inch bagasse plates feature three divided sections for perfect portion control and food separation. Ideal for serving main meals with sides like salads, fries, and desserts – keeping flavours distinct and presentation tidy.

𝟏𝟎𝟎% 𝐂𝐎𝐌𝐏𝐎𝐒𝐓𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 𝐒𝐔𝐆𝐀𝐑𝐂𝐀𝐍𝐄 𝐅𝐈𝐁𝐑𝐄 𝐌𝐀𝐓𝐄𝐑𝐈𝐀𝐋: Made from renewable bagasse (sugarcane fibre), these eco-friendly plates are plastic-free, tree-free, biodegradable, and fully compostable within months – a sustainable alternative to paper or plastic plates.

𝐇𝐄𝐀𝐕𝐘-𝐃𝐔𝐓𝐘 𝐒𝐓𝐑𝐄𝐍𝐆𝐓𝐇 & 𝐋𝐄𝐀𝐊 𝐑𝐄𝐒𝐈𝐒𝐓𝐀𝐍𝐂𝐄: Designed for both hot and cold meals, these rigid compostable plates are cut-resistant, oil-resistant and water-resistant. Perfect for curries, burgers, pasta, and salads without bending or leaking.

𝐌𝐈𝐂𝐑𝐎𝐖𝐀𝐕𝐄 & 𝐅𝐑𝐄𝐄𝐙𝐄𝐑 𝐒𝐀𝐅𝐄: Reheat food or store leftovers confidently – these biodegradable plates won’t warp or melt when heated or frozen. Reliable for everyday meals, school lunches, and professional food service.

𝐒𝐀𝐅𝐄, 𝐄𝐂𝐎-𝐅𝐑𝐈𝐄𝐍𝐃𝐋𝐘 & 𝐌𝐔𝐋𝐓𝐈-𝐎𝐂𝐂𝐀𝐒𝐈𝐎𝐍 𝐔𝐒𝐄: BPA-free and chemical-free for a healthy dining experience. Perfect for birthday parties, Christmas, picnics, schools, catering, restaurants, or daily home use – no washing up required.
